cards.title: Performance
cards.body: Optimized for speed with lazy loading, code splitting, and edge caching.

cards.title: Security
cards.body: Built-in protection against XSS, CSRF, and injection attacks.

cards.title: Accessibility
cards.body: WCAG 2.1 AA compliant with semantic HTML and ARIA support.

cards.title: Scalability
cards.body: Horizontal scaling with stateless architecture and queue-based processing.

cards.title: Observability
cards.body: Integrated logging, metrics, and distributed tracing out of the box.

cards.title: Developer Experience
cards.body: Hot reload, TypeScript support, and comprehensive documentation.
